findings.description: Knowledge file states the request scope is implemented as a wrapper without the qualifier present in the source. Source says "基本的にServletAPIの HTTPServletRequest#getAttribute()/setAttribute()メソッドのラッパーである" (basically a wrapper), implying there may be additional behavior beyond a pure wrapper. The knowledge file renders this as a definitive fact: "HTTPServletRequest#getAttribute() / HTTPServletRequest#setAttribute() メソッドのラッパーとして実装されている", removing the "基本的に" nuance.
findings.source_evidence: 基本的にServletAPIの HTTPServletRequest#getAttribute()/setAttribute()メソッドのラッパーである
